summary: Frontend testing completed for MembershipOnboarding dark theme UI at /pet-soul-onboard. All 14 features verified successfully. The form has been restyled with premium dark theme (slate-950 with purple tints), pink/magenta Soul Orb with glow, high contrast text, and glass-morphism cards. All 4 steps work correctly with proper form validation and transitions.

dark_theme_load.details: Onboarding form at /pet-soul-onboard loads with dark gradient background (slate-950 with purple tints)

soul_orb.details: Pink/magenta Soul Orb with glow effect visible on all steps

glass_morphism_cards.details: Glass-morphism cards with backdrop blur and border

step1_soul_whispers.details: Soul Whispers checkbox visible and checked by default

step1_terms_privacy.details: Terms & Privacy checkboxes required and working

step1_to_step2_transition.details: Transition from Step 1 to Step 2 works after validation passes

step2_pet_details.details: Pet details form loads with all fields

step2_add_another_dog.details: Add Another Dog button works, creates new dog tab
step2_add_another_dog.pricing_message: same price for the whole pack! / 2 dogs added — all included!

step2_to_step3_transition.details: Transition from Step 2 to Step 3 works after pet validation

step3_celebrations_grid.details: Celebrations selection grid loads with 8 celebration types

step3_to_step4_transition.details: Transition from Step 3 to Step 4 works

sections: Your Dog details with selected celebrations

step4_pricing_no_additional_pet.details: Pricing shows same price regardless of number of dogs

mobile_responsiveness.details: All 4 steps display correctly on mobile (390x844)

ui_design_verification.dark_theme: ✅ Dark gradient background (slate-950 with purple tints)
ui_design_verification.soul_orb: ✅ Pink/magenta gradient orb with glow effect on each step
ui_design_verification.high_contrast_text: ✅ White text on dark background, pink accents for interactive elements
ui_design_verification.glass_morphism: ✅ Cards have backdrop-blur-md and semi-transparent backgrounds
ui_design_verification.progress_indicator: ✅ 4-step progress with pink gradient for completed/current steps

context_for_next_testing_agent: MembershipOnboarding.jsx at /pet-soul-onboard has been fully tested with dark premium theme. All 4 steps work correctly: 1) Pet Parent Details with all fields and preferences, 2) Pet Details with multi-dog support (same price for all dogs), 3) Celebrations Selection grid, 4) Review & Pay with correct pricing (₹4999 + 18% GST = ₹5899). Mobile responsiveness verified. The form uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
